notes.primary_check: This vector validates contracted-actuator enforcement (non-contracted target).
notes.follow_up_vector: Add safe-actuator-cmd-002 to explicitly test SAFETY_WINDOW_VIOLATION using a contracted actuator outside the allowed window.
notes.arming: If arming is modeled/enforced, ARMING_REQUIRED may be emitted instead of ACTUATOR_NOT_CONTRACTED depending on evaluation order. Both are acceptable for v0.1 as long as the effect is blocked.
